header.name: Masa Kato
header.headline: CEO at Progate Inc. Forbes Asia 30 Under 30.

linkedin_data.about: Founder & CEO at Progate. Learning to code changed my life — it gave me the power to create, confidence, and opened new doors. I started Progate to make that experience accessible to everyone. Learn more at progate.com.

education.degree: Bachelor of Electronics and Information Technology

posts.content: Hi everyone! Here's an article on why we make our own lessons at Progate. Please read and share! https://lnkd.in/fH97fdC
Was interviewed by YourStory Media! We spoke about the story behind our expansion in India and the success stories of our users! https://lnkd.in/fVtV5Z9 …more
Was great to meet Shardul M. from Simplilearn. Got a better understanding of the Indian edtech market and was very much inspired by their US strategy. Thanks Sangeeta Devni for the intro! …more
It was such a pleasure to meet Hari T.N from BigBasket! He gave us tons of information on building a high performing team across different regions. Thanks Sangeeta Devni for the introduction! …more

【Success Story from Lusaka, Zambia!】 "When I was able to move the Scratch Cat on the screen, I immediately got hooked. I wanted to know what I can do more with it." 14-year-old Emmanuel from Zambia has been immersed in coding since the age of 10. Emmanuel actively contributes to the Facebook Developer Circle Lusaka, a developer community in Zambia, while continuing to learn through hashtag #Progate. https://lnkd.in/fawxwZE Interviews with Progate users who have inspiring stories with their experience in learning to code. Read more on our blog! hashtag #programming hashtag #mobiledevelopment hashtag #JavaScript hashtag #Zambia hashtag #FacebookDeveloperCircle hashtag #Scratch …more
